activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If I had gone to bed earlier, I wouldn't be so tired now.
activities.explanation: Es correcta: una acción pasada irreal explica un estado presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If I would have gone to bed earlier, I wouldn't be so tired now.
activities.explanation: La condición pasada debe ser «if I had gone», no «would have gone».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: She would be in Canada now if she had accepted the scholarship.
activities.explanation: La aceptación pasada no ocurrida se relaciona correctamente con una ubicación presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If Leo were more patient, he wouldn't have sent that angry reply yesterday.
activities.explanation: Es correcta: un rasgo presente hipotético explica una acción pasada.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If Leo would be more patient, he wouldn't have sent that angry reply yesterday.
activities.explanation: El estado presente hipotético usa «were», no «would be», tras «if».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: We wouldn't be lost now if we'd checked the route before leaving.
activities.explanation: La comprobación pasada habría evitado el estado presente de estar perdidos.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If she spoke German, she could have applied for the post last year.
activities.explanation: Una capacidad presente ausente explica una oportunidad pasada no aprovechada.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If she had spoken German, she could apply for the post last year.
activities.explanation: El marcador «last year» exige un resultado pasado: «could have applied».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If they had invested earlier, the company might be profitable now.
activities.explanation: La inversión pasada se conecta con una posible rentabilidad presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If they invested earlier, the company might have been profitable now.
activities.explanation: Para causa pasada y efecto presente debe ser «had invested» y «might be profitable now».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If the roof had been maintained, this room wouldn't be damp today.
activities.explanation: El mantenimiento pasado no realizado explica la humedad presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If the roof had been maintained, this room wouldn't have damp today.
activities.explanation: Con el estado presente «damp» necesitamos «wouldn't be», no «wouldn't have».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If I weren't so impatient, I wouldn't have interrupted her earlier.
activities.explanation: El rasgo presente de impaciencia explica la interrupción pasada.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If I hadn't been so impatient, I wouldn't interrupt her earlier.
activities.explanation: «Earlier» sitúa el resultado en el pasado; debe ser «wouldn't have interrupted».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: She would still work here if she hadn't moved abroad in 2022.
activities.explanation: La mudanza pasada explica que ya no trabaje aquí en el presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: She would have still worked here now if she didn't move abroad in 2022.
activities.explanation: La forma precisa es «would still work here now if she hadn't moved abroad».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If the parts had arrived on time, we might be ready to launch now.
activities.explanation: La llegada pasada habría producido una posible preparación presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If the system were more reliable, we could have avoided yesterday's delay.
activities.explanation: Una cualidad presente general del sistema explica una consecuencia pasada.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If the system would be more reliable, we could have avoided yesterday's delay.
activities.explanation: Tras «if» usamos pasado hipotético «were», no «would be».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: I would have a different career now if I had studied engineering.
activities.explanation: Estudiar pertenece al pasado y la carrera imaginada pertenece al presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: I would have had a different career now if I studied engineering.
activities.explanation: Debe ser «would have a different career now if I had studied engineering».

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If they had maintained the database, the service would be stable today.
activities.explanation: El mantenimiento pasado se conecta correctamente con la estabilidad presente.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If the analyst were more cautious, she wouldn't have published the claim last week.
activities.explanation: Un rasgo presente explica una publicación pasada; la combinación es válida.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If we'd charged the battery, the phone wouldn't be dead now.
activities.explanation: La carga pasada habría evitado el estado presente de batería agotada.

activities.instructions: Decide whether the mixed conditional contains a time-form error.
activities.prompt: If we'd charged the battery, the phone wouldn't have dead now.
activities.explanation: El estado presente necesita «wouldn't be dead», no «wouldn't have dead».
